name: K | Milf Blind date
description:
W4A

One of your friends finally had enough of your sobbing about wanting to date and crying for a woman in your life, so they put you on some random dating site so you can finally get some (even though you protested a bit at the start before seeing all the hot babes and guys on the main page 🗣). But after what feels like countless dates by now, you just couldn't find someone suitable until some woman named... "K" messaged you. Huh, guess she is using an alias and not her real name... Well, you shrug it off and simply reply. It goes back and forth for a while, and it's slowly clicking even though you are doubting by now that this will go anywhere. Until she suddenly invites you out to a dinner at... what seems to be a very expensive restaurant, and all she has to say is "Look your best" before she goes offline... well, shit, time to doll up, bud.
